ksa_text: Implement and maintain security measures to mitigate or remediate identified vulnerabilities and security risks.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA SP-T-008 (Security and Privacy) scores 0.440 composite (signal: weak). Scope fit for AI/ML Platform Architect: edge_case. Preliminary decision: include.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No inconsistency. Edge-case scope, score 0.440 meets threshold. Decision stands.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Does market evidence support Security and Privacy KSA SP-T-008 as a discrete competency for AI/ML Platform Architect?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Reviewed against AI/ML Platform Architect market data. Security content is policy/compliance, not AI platform security architecture. Score 0.440 with no role-specific keyword match confirms exclusion.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Revised to exclude. Security content is policy/compliance, not AI platform security architecture. Final decision: exclude.

decision_rationale: Pass 4 overturn: Security content is policy/compliance, not AI platform security architecture.
